## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] DB changes are a new file in `supabase/migrations/` (never edit applied migrations)
- [ ] No secrets committed; new config documented in `docs/secrets.md`
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or deployment changed
